title: BITE! 咬合力
lyric:
[00:03.552]制作人：雷声
[00:06.314]歌手：雷雨心
[00:09.490]作词：Jacob Crooked/Peter Sierzput
[00:12.618]作曲/编曲：雷声
[00:15.362]混音/母带：黄巍 Zach Huang
[00:18.570]录音棚：52Hz Studio
[00:21.090]吉他：张星/张清
[00:23.282]贝斯：赵洋
[00:24.330]鼓：陈歌
[00:26.554]Every single morning
[00:28.603](Huh)
[00:29.554]I hear my alarm clock ringing
[00:31.610](Ringing)
[00:32.532]Like it's wrong to just be chilling
[00:34.570](Yawn)
[00:35.690]Haven't I told you not to wake me up
[00:40.434](huh~~~~)
[00:42.370]There will be time
[00:44.266]To act all grown up
[00:47.124]Why can't you just stop and listen
[00:50.316]Let's do what I want
[00:52.892]On Monday, wanna hang out with friends
[00:56.204]Tuesday, I'll try all the best cakes
[00:59.476]Get out the way or have a taste of
[01:02.540]My scissors
[01:04.548]Can feel my patience running thin
[01:10.892]Oh, I wish that you could just take it easy
[01:17.108]Laid back vibes is the way I roll so
[01:21.312]Get off my tail or else
[01:25.328]You will get to say
[01:27.008]Hello to my jaws
[01:28.616]This shark's got a bite, don't you know
[01:42.995]I count one, two, but I can't catch the three
[01:45.211]I'd like every second and every minute of my day to be mellow and free
[01:50.391]But you said work, right?
[01:51.813]I'll do it just fine
[01:53.445]Don't underestimate me, yeah
[01:56.677]On Friday, it's goodbye to classes
[02:00.176]Saturday, I put on my best dress
[02:03.293]Get out the way or have a taste of
[02:06.501]My scissors
[02:08.478]Can feel my patience running thin
[02:14.877]Oh, I wish that you could just take it easy
[02:21.061]Laid back vibes is the way I roll so
[02:24.973]Get off my tail or else
[02:29.293]You will get to say
[02:30.989]Hello to my jaws
[02:32.757]This shark's got a bite, don't you know
[02:37.493]Don't you know
[02:40.941]You should know that
[02:45.309]I'll bite 'em all
[03:12.277]This shark's got a bite, you know
[03:15.245]I'll hurry up and get it done
[03:17.846]But don't run my patience to the ground
[03:21.411]If you need me here
[03:23.362]（This shark's got a bite, don't you know）
[03:27.552]Yeah, you better keep it fun
[03:30.554]When I try I'm second to none
[03:33.553]You will get to say
[03:35.130]Hello to my jaws
[03:36.680]This shark's got a bite, don't you know
